entity.summary: Permissionless multi-chain DeFi exchange and routing platform combining spot swaps, bridge aggregation, liquidity access, staking, and related asset-movement functions through the broader BIM protocol.
entity.notes: BIM Exchange is recorded as the exchange and routing surface of the broader BIM protocol rather than split into separate swap, bridge, or yield entities. First-party documentation and current independent metrics support active exchange-like operation. Confidence is medium because the protocol also spans yield and staking products beyond exchange routing. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: BIM Exchange swap documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes BIM Exchange as a dynamic routing layer aggregating liquidity across decentralized exchanges and documents swap, buy, sell, and supported-source behavior.

evidence.title: BIM exchange and aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics identify exchange.bim.finance as the protocol website and report non-zero current fees, revenue, TVL, DEX aggregator volume, and bridge aggregator volume across multiple networks.
